:mod:`The Slice to List Visitor` --- Slicing into a collection of multi-dimensional arrays
==========================================================================================

.. module:: slicer.slice2list

.. versionadded:: 0.1
.. moduleauthor:: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>

.. class:: Slice2List(object)

Methods
-------

    .. method:: Slice2List(visitor):

    	:param visitor: a visitor to handle the creation of arrays.

        Slice2List create a discrete list of n dimensional arrays (e.g. a list of vertical slices or a list of horizontal fields) with their associated metadata. The visitor should provided 
        the following interface::

            def __call__(self,slices,metadata,**kargs):
                # slices: a list of one slice (exceptionally 2) to extract from the source array
                # metadata: metadata regarding the dimensions of the array
                # kargs: metadata extracted from the original directive passed to the slicer

            def preProcess(self,dimensions,source,shape,slices,metadata):
                # see :class:`slicer.slicer.Slicer`

            def postProcess(self,dimensions,source,shape,slices,metadata):
                # see :class:`slicer.slicer.Slicer`

            def fieldSet(self,new = None):
                # should return a collection of created fields / arrays.

    .. method:: __call__(dimensions,variable,src,dst,meta,is_interval,**kargs):

        The parameters are described in :class:`slicer.slicer.Slicer`. Copies slices of
        *variable* into a newly create array.

    .. method:: preProcess(dimensions,variable,shape,slices,metadata):

        calls the visitor's preProcess method.

    .. method:: postProcess(dimensions,variable,shape,slices,metadata):
    
        calls the visitor's postProcess method.

    .. method:: fieldset():

        returns the generated :class:`fields.fieldset.FieldSet`.
